expectations.evidence: AppShell with header and navbar props

expectations.text: Uses separate mobile/desktop Burger toggles with hiddenFrom/visibleFrom
expectations.evidence: Two Burger components, one with hiddenFrom='sm' and one with visibleFrom='sm'

expectations.text: Uses NavLink for sidebar navigation items
expectations.evidence: NavLink used for all nav items including nested children

expectations.text: AppShell navbar has breakpoint and collapsed props
expectations.evidence: navbar={{ width: 260, breakpoint: 'sm', collapsed: { mobile: !mobileOpened, desktop: !desktopOpened } }}
useDisclosure imported from @mantine/hooks, used for mobileOpened and desktopOpened

expectations.text: Includes light/dark mode toggle using useMantineColorScheme
expectations.evidence: ColorSchemeToggle component using useMantineColorScheme with toggleColorScheme

expectations.text: Does not use hardcoded pixel values for layout dimensions
